languages.text: "Какое знание ты ищешь на этот раз? Стоит ли оно... самокопаний?"
"What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"
languages.original_text: "Какое знание ты ищешь на этот раз? Стоит ли оно... самокопаний?"

traits.locale_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"
"What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"
"What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

languages.text: "Welches Wissen sucht Ihr diesmal? Rechtfertigt es diese ... Selbstexkavation?"
languages.original_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

traits.locale_text: "Welches Wissen sucht Ihr diesmal? Rechtfertigt es diese ... Selbstexkavation?"

languages.text: « Que cherchez-vous à apprendre cette fois ? Cette... auto-extraction est-elle vraiment nécessaire ? »
languages.original_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

traits.locale_text: « Que cherchez-vous à apprendre cette fois ? Cette... auto-extraction est-elle vraiment nécessaire ? »

languages.text: “这一次你又在寻求什么知识？它值得你这样……自我解剖吗？”
languages.original_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

traits.locale_text: “这一次你又在寻求什么知识？它值得你这样……自我解剖吗？”

languages.text: «¿Qué conocimiento busca esta vez? ¿Justifica esta... autoexcavación?».
languages.original_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué conocimiento busca esta vez? ¿Justifica esta... autoexcavación?».

languages.text: 「今回はどんな知識を求めているのか？それは...自分を掘り下げる価値があるのか？」
languages.original_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

traits.locale_text: 「今回はどんな知識を求めているのか？それは...自分を掘り下げる価値があるのか？」

languages.text: "Bu kez neyi arıyorsun? Bu... Kendi kendini deşmeni haklı çıkarıyor mu?"
languages.original_text: "What knowledge are you seeking this time? Does it warrant this... self-excavation?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu kez neyi arıyorsun? Bu... Kendi kendini deşmeni haklı çıkarıyor mu?"
